title: Museum of the African Diaspora - San Francisco - Tripadvisor
content: I am glad I went. Contemporary art with a political edge. Much of it I could not relate to because I do not share the experience that produced the art.

title: Instagram
content: By continuing, you agree to Instagram's Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. On MLK Day, I visited the Museum of the African Diaspora (MOAD), where families from across San Francisco and the Bay Area came to experience the museum and even create their own art. For 20 years, @moadsf has been an institution where Black creativity is visible and at the forefront of our city’s cultural life. @danielluriesf thank you for taking the time to say hello to me and my kids. Thank you for highlighting all the amazing places in San Francisco! Our family had a wonderful time at the museum today. Praise God for gathering the people to celebrate a wonderful human who was all about getting people to be together exactly like this. Video by Daniel Lurie on June 25, 2026.
